block_01: Tesla becomes world’s most valuable automaker
block_02: Innovative tech companies keep conquering the stock market. Last week Tesla Inc. overtook Toyota Motor Corp. to become the world’s most valuable automaker with a market capitalization of more than $190 billion. Tesla’s share price has risen over 200% in a 6-month period, reaching its all-time high of $1027.34 last week.
block_06: The previous surge in Tesla’s shares happened in January 2020. Back then, the electric vehicles manufacturer became the second-most valuable automaker surpassing the $100 billion market cap, thus leaving Volkswagen AG behind and being inferior to Toyota Motor Corp.
block_08: Or will Elon Musk’s company increase market dominance?
